changeSet.author: openelis-pathology
changeSet.comment: Set default pathology workflow type and attach per-type stage routing metadata to pathology pages.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook SET workflow_type = 'histopathology_biopsy_tissue' WHERE is_template = true AND title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND (workflow_type IS NULL OR workflow_type = '' OR workflow_type = 'pathology');
